caption: A man is centered within a circular frame against a solid black background. He has a smiling expression and wears a black garment with gold-colored ornate embroidery on the chest and sleeves, paired with a matching black cap. The setting appears to be indoors, as a light-colored wall and a doorframe are visible behind him. Across the bottom of the screen, the text "Seyi Adebola" appears in white font, positioned both on the left and in the center. Throughout the sequence, the man remains stationary and maintains his pose and expression, resulting in virtually no movement or change in the scene across the frames.
